name: accent_dot_cluster

meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.21 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-07-01] #331 cluster selector with the set adverb 「ともに」. Each listed letter's first occurrence is dotted independently — the s and the n of the reclaimed run Visnu → Viṣṇu. The adverb is spelling-only (preserved via the verbatim body).

source: Visnu［＃snはともに下ドット付き］

expected.serialize: Visnu［＃snはともに下ドット付き］
